author: chenjhu
description: Shows marked images as compact inline thumbnails with a larger hover or tap preview. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: chenjhu
manifest.description: Shows marked images as compact inline thumbnails with a larger hover or tap preview.
manifest.name: Image Glance

name: Image Glance

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

## 0.2.3

- Fixes automated review feedback by moving preview visibility and position
  state out of direct static style assignments.
- Uses Obsidian DOM helper APIs for preview and thumbnail elements.
- Declares CodeMirror packages used by the Live Preview extension.
- Adds GitHub artifact attestations for release assets.

## 0.2.2

- Adds opt-in thumbnail rendering for marked wiki and Markdown image embeds.
- Supports Reading view and Live Preview.
- Adds hover preview on desktop and optional tap preview on mobile.
- Prevents marked thumbnails from triggering Obsidian's native image click and
  resize behavior.
- Keeps unmarked images rendering normally.
